summary: A Go-based CLI tool for detecting, migrating, and running infrastructure and API assertions, with recent expansion into WebSocket, gRPC, and monorepo support.
concerns: Uncommitted changes (2 modified, 1 staged) may indicate instability
Heavy focus on goss migration suggests legacy coupling
Broad feature expansion (WebSocket, gRPC, monorepo) might lead to scope creep
suggestions: Commit or stash the current working tree changes to establish a clean baseline
Focus testing efforts on the new WebSocket and gRPC assertion features
Document the plugin interface to encourage community extensions
